name: mcp-server-for-intercom
description: An MCP-compliant server that enables AI assistants to access and analyze customer support data from Intercom.

tools.name: search_conversations_by_customer
tools.description: Searches for conversations by customer email or ID with optional date filtering.

customerIdentifier.description: Customer email or ID to search for

startDate.description: Optional start date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '15/01/2025')

endDate.description: Optional end date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '21/01/2025')

keywords.description: Optional keywords to filter conversations by content

tools.name: search_tickets_by_status
tools.description: Searches for tickets by status with optional date filtering.

status.description: Ticket status to search for (open, pending, or resolved)

startDate.description: Optional start date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '15/01/2025')

endDate.description: Optional end date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '21/01/2025')

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: Retrieves Intercom conversations within a specific date range (max 7 days).

startDate.description: Start date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '15/01/2025'). Required.

endDate.description: End date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '21/01/2025'). Required.

keyword.description: Optional keyword to filter conversations by content.

exclude.description: Optional exclusion filter for conversation content.

tools.name: search_tickets_by_customer
tools.description: Searches for tickets by customer email or ID with optional date filtering.

customerIdentifier.description: Customer email or ID to search for

startDate.description: Optional start date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '15/01/2025')

endDate.description: Optional end date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '21/01/2025')

authorization.name: Authorization
authorization.description: Use the INTERCOM_ACCESS_TOKEN as Bearer token in Authorization header
